title: The Sky Is Falling
summary: An interview with John P. Holdren in The Bulletin of Atomic Scientists in the magazine's Five Minutes to Midnight issue.
body: Note For more information on the "Five Minutes to Midnight" special issue, read the Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists January 17, 2007 news announcement: http://www.thebulletin.org/weekly-highlight/20070117.html The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Holdren, John. “The Sky Is Falling.” Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists , January / February 2007 Copy to Clipboard The Sky Is Falling View Citation Print Want to read more?
